title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v MUKANTWARI
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v MUKANTWARI
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 00448/2025/CA (Gakwaya, P.J.) 30 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza nshinjabyaha – Inyito y’icyaha – Ihame ry’amategeko nshinjabyaha
ryemeza ko Inkiko ziburanisha ibikorwa bigize icyaha, zitaburanisha inyito y’icyaha yemejwe
n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa n’Inkiko zabanje, ibi bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito ikwiye iteganya n’amategeko, ko zidategetswe gukurikiza inyito
y’icyaha yatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha.
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Ibimenyetso mu manza nshinjabyaha – Imvugo z’uregwa – Kuba
uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo, agahakana icyaha yari yaremeye mu nzego
z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu Rukiko agihakana ari byo bigomba kwemerwa, ahubwo
Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo gushishoza no gusesengura akoresheje umutimanama we,
agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Mukantwari mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Ngoma
icyaha cyo gutunda no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nyuma yuko
afashwe afite ikilo kimwe n’inusu (1,5kg) cy’urumogi, agiye kurugurisha k’uwitwa Bukuru utuye
i Nyarubuye, iyo akaba ari inshuro ya kabiri yari arumushyiriye ngo arugure. Urwo Urukiko
rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gutunda no gucuruza urumogi, ariko kuko
ari ubwa mbere akurikiranyweho icyaha bizwi, rwemeza ko bikwiye kumubera impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha ituma agabanyirizwa igihano, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka
makumyabiri n’itanu (25) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni makumyabiri n’ibihumbi
magana atanu (20.500.000 Frw).
Mukantwari yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana asaba kugabanyirizwa
ibihano kubera ko yakoze icyaha abitewe n’ubukene, ko urwo rumogi yaruhawe n’umuntu ngo
arumujyanire amuhembe amafaranga ibihumbi icumi (10.000 Frw), yasabye kandi ko igihano
yahanishwa cyasubikwa kubera ko yasize abana atazi uko babayeho. Urwo Rukjiko narwo rwaciye
urubanza rusanga hari impamvu zkwiye gutuma agabanyiirizwa ibihano nuko rumuhanisha
igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni
eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
Mukantwari nanone yarajuriye noneho mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko akomeje gutakamba
asaba kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko kuva mu ntangiriro yemeye icyaha ku buryo
budashidikanywaho, agaragariza Urukiko ko yasize abana badafite gikurikirana ariko
rumuhanisha igihano kiremereye, ko ndetse n’ubu akomeje kwemera ko yafatanywe urumogi yari
atwaje Bukuru, akaba nta mugambi mubisha yari afite ahubwo ari uko yari yabuze ibyo agaburira
abana be, ibi bisobanuro bikaba bitarahawe agaciro, ariyo mpamvu asaba uru Rukiko
kubishingiraho rukamuhanisha igihano gito gishoboka, ndetse agakurirwaho ihazabu kuko nayo
Urukiko rwanze kuyimukuriraho kandi yararugaragarije ko ntaho yayikura. Mu iburanisha, yavuze
ko ubujurire bwe bushingiye ku gusaba guhindurirwa inyito y’icyaha kuko atigeze yemera ko
yacuruje urumogi, ahubwo ko urwo yafatanywe rutari urwe rwari urwa Bukuru wari urumuhaye
ngo arumujyanire iwe, ko rero icyaha cyari gikwiye kumuhama ari ugufatanwa urumogi.

Ubushinjacyaha bwo buvuga ko uregwa yahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no gucuruza urumogi
kubera ko mu Bugenzacyaha yacyemeye agasobanura uko yagikoze, ko kuba yarahinduye imvugo
agiye kuburana mu mizi, nta gaciro byahabwa.
Incamake y’icyemezo: 1. Ihame ry’amategeko nshinjabyaha ryemeza ko Inkiko ziburanisha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha, zitaburanisha inyito y’icyaha yemejwe n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa
n’Inkiko zabanje, ibi bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito
ikwiye iteganya n’amategeko, ko zidategetswe gukurikiza inyito y’icyaha yatanzwe
n’Ubushinjacyaha.
2. Kuba uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura imvugo, agahakana icyaha yari yaremeye
mu nzego z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu Rukiko agihakana ari byo bigomba
kwemerwa, ahubwo Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo gushishoza no gusesengura akoresheje
umutimanama we, agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Sgt. Ntaganira n’abandi, RPA 0010/06/CS-RPA 0011/06/CS-RPA
0012/06/06/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 18/7/2008.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Nsanzamahoro, RPAA 00319/2022/CA rwo ku wa 17/11/2023.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Habanabakize, RPAA 00241/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 30/11/2022.
Inyandiko z’abahanga:
Général Likulia Bolongo, Droit pénal spécial zaïrois, Tome I, 2e édition, L.G.D.J., Paris, 1985,
P.20.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 24/11/2021, MUKANTWARI Immaculée yafashwe afite ikilo kimwe n’inusu
(1,5kg) cy’urumogi, agiye kurugurisha k’uwitwa Bukuru utuye i Nyarubuye, iyo akaba ari inshuro
ya kabiri yari arumushyiriye ngo arugure.
[2] Iperereza rirangiye, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze MUKANTWARI Immaculée mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Ngoma icyaha cyo gutunda no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko
bw’urumogi, busaba ko cyamuhama agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni mirongo itatu (30.000.000 Frw).
[3] MUKANTWARI Immaculée yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko urumogi yafatanywe
rutari urwe, ahubwo ko hari uwari urumuhaye ngo arumutwaze.

[4] Mu rubanza no RP 01659/2021/TGI/NGOMA rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Ngoma ku wa 15/12/2021, rushingiye ku kuba abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha, MUKANTWARI
Immaculée yaravuze ko akura urumogi muri Tanzaniya akaruzana kururanguza mu Rwanda, urwo
yafatanywe akaba yari yarugurishije Bukuru, amusaba kurumugereza iwe i Nyarubuye, ko ari
inshuro ya kabiri yari arumugurishije, ariko urwo baguze mbere akaba yararwitwariye, kuba hari
umutangabuhamya HAKIZIMANA Janvier watanze amakuru yatumye uregwa afatwa, rushingiye
kandi kuri raporo y’inzego z’ibanze, rwemeje ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gutunda no gucuruza
urumogi, ariko kuko ari ubwa mbere akurikiranyweho icyaha bizwi, rwemeza ko bikwiye
kumubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha ituma agabanyirizwa igihano, rumuhanisha igihano
cy’igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu (25) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni
makumyabiri n’ibihumbi magana atanu (20.500.000 Frw).
[5] MUKANTWARI Immaculée yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana
asaba kugabanyirizwa ibihano kubera ko yakoze icyaha abitewe n’ubukene, ko urwo rumogi
yaruhawe n’umuntu ngo arumujyanire amuhembe amafaranga ibihumbi icumi (10.000 Frw),
yasabye kandi ko igihano yahanishwa cyasubikwa kubera ko yasize abana atazi uko babayeho.
[6] Mu rubanza no RPA 00058/2022/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 14/4/2022,
rushingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha zo kuba ari ubwa mbere MUKANTWARI Immaculée
akoze icyaha, kuba urumogi yafatanywe rwarafatiriwe no kuba yarasobanuye ko yishoye mu
bikorwa byo kurucuruza kubera ubukene, akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano, ahanishwa igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000
Frw).
[7] Ku wa 30/4/2025, MUKANTWARI Immaculée yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko
akomeje gutakamba asaba kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko kuva mu ntangiriro yemeye
icyaha ku buryo budashidikanywaho, agaragariza Urukiko ko yasize abana badafite gikurikirana
ariko rumuhanisha igihano kiremereye, ko ndetse n’ubu akomeje kwemera ko yafatanywe urumogi
yari atwaje Bukuru, akaba nta mugambi mubisha yari afite ahubwo ari uko yari yabuze ibyo
agaburira abana be, ibi bisobanuro bikaba bitarahawe agaciro, ariyo mpamvu asaba uru Rukiko
kubishingiraho rukamuhanisha igihano gito gishoboka, ndetse agakurirwaho ihazabu kuko nayo
Urukiko rwanze kuyimukuriraho kandi yararugaragarije ko ntaho yayikura.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko kuba MUKANTWARI Immaculée yahamijwe icyaha cyo
gutunda no gucuruza urumogi kubera ko mu Bugenzacyaha yacyemeye agasobanura uko
yagikoze1, kuba yarahinduye imvugo agiye kuburana mu mizi, nta gaciro byahabwa, hashingiwe
ku murongo2 wafashwe mu manza zitandukanye uvuga ko guhakana icyaha umuburanyi yemeye
mu iperereza ubwabyo bidatesha ukwemera kwe agaciro, kuko Umucamanza afite ububasha bwo
gusuzumana ubushishozi no guha agaciro izo mvugo z’uregwa wemeye icyaha harebwe ibikorwa
1 Mu Bugenzacyaha yaracyemeye avuga ko urumogi yafatanywe rwari urwa Bukuru kuko yari yarumugurishije
akamusaba kuruvana iwe Gatore akarumugereza Nyarubuye kuko ariho atuye, avuga ko ubwa mbere bagura
yarwitwariye, urwa kabiri akamusaba kurumugereza iwe, abajijwe impamvu ahakana ko urwo rumogi atari urwe
avuga ko ari uko yari yamaze kururanguza, akomeza avuga ko urumogi acuruza arukura Tanzania hanyuma
akaruranguza.
2 2urubanza no. RPAA 00480/2023/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/2/2025 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Twizeymana Jean de Dieu (igika cya 18).

aregwa, igihe asanga uko kwemera kudashidikanywaho akabiha agaciro, ashingiye ku
mutimanama we (intime conviction).
[9] Urubanza rwahawe no RPAA 00448/2025/CA, ruburanishwa ku wa 16/12/2025,
MUKANTWARI Immaculée yunganiwe na Me BYIRINGIRO KALISA, Ubushinjacyaha
buhagarariwe na BUNYOYE Grâce, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[10] Mu iburanisha, MUKANTWARI Immaculée yavuze ko ubujurire bwe bushingiye ku
gusaba guhindurirwa inyito y’icyaha kuko atakoze kandi atigeze yemera ko yacuruje urumogi,
ahubwo ko urwo yafatanywe rutari urwe rwari urwa Bukuru wari urumuhaye ngo arumujyanire
iwe, ko rero icyaha cyari gikwiye kumuhama ari ugufatanwa urumogi, akaba asaba uru Rukiko
kuba aricyo rumuhanira.
[11] Harebwe imiburanire y’ababuranyi, ikibazo kigomba gusumwa mu rubanza ni ukumenya
niba inyito y’icyaha MUKANTWARI Immaculée yahamijwe yo gutunda no gucuruza urumogi
ikwiye guhinduka, agahamwa no gufatanwa urumogi.
II. IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISUZUMWA RYACYO
Kumenya niba inyito y’icyaha MUKANTWARI Immaculée yahamijwe cyo
gutunda no gucuruza urumogi ikwiye guhinduka, agahamwa n’icyaha cyo
gufatanwa urumogi
[12] MUKANTWARI Immaculée avuga ko atigeze yemera ko yacuruje urumogi kuko urwo
yafatanywe rutari urwe ahubwo rwari urwa Bukuru yari amuhaye ngo arumutwaze arumugereze
iwe mu rugo i Nyarubuye, amuhembe amafaranga 10.000 Frw, ko rero asaba uru Rukiko guhindura
inyito y’icyaha yahamijwe cyo gutunda no gucuruza urumogi, agahamwa n’icyaha cyo kuba
yararufatanywe.
[13] Me BYIRINGIRO KALISA, wunganira MUKANTWARI Immaculée, avuga ko kuva mu
ntangiriro yemeye icyaha ku buryo budashidikanywaho agaragaza impamvu yamuteye gucuruza
urumogi ko ari ubukene yari afite, ko rero Urukiko rwagombaga kubishingiraho bifatiwe hamwe
n’ingingo ya 60 y’Itegeko no 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 nk’uko ryahinduwe n’Itegeko no
59/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, mu ngingo yaryo ya 2 (a),
rukamugabanyiriza igihano ku buryo buhagije, agahabwa igihano kiri munsi y’igito giteganywa
n’Itegeko, kuko icyaha yakoze nta ngaruka cyateje muri sosiyete, ko kandi imirongo itandukanye
yafashwe n’Inkiko itavanaho ubwisanzure n’ubushishozi bw’Urukiko mu gutanga igihano.
[14] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko kuva ku ikubitiro MUKANTWARI Immaculée yemeye ko
yacuruzaga urumogi, ndetse ko yari inshuro ya kabiri yari arugurishije kwa Bukuru, uretse ko
inshuro ya kabiri afatwa aribwo yari yamusabye kurumujyanira mu rugo, ku nshuro ya mbere
akaba yari yarwitwariye, ko rero imvugo ze zo mu iperereza zikwiye kugumana agaciro kazo
agakomeza guhamwa n’icyaha yahamijwe cyo gutunda no gucuruza urumogi, kandi hakemezwa
ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza yajuririye.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA

[15] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba inyito y’icyaha MUKANTWARI
Immaculée yahamijwe ikwiye guhinduka, agahamwa no gufatanwa urumogi aho kuba kurutunda
no kurucuruza.
[16] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza no RPAA 00241/2022/CA3 rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/11/2022, ihame ry’amategeko nshinjabyaha ryemeza ko Inkiko ziburanisha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha, zitaburanisha inyito y’icyaha yemejwe n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa
n’Inkiko zabanje, ibi bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito
ikwiye iteganya n’amategeko, ko zidategetswe gukurikiza inyito y’icyaha yatanzwe
n’Ubushinjacyaha, bisobanura na none ko inyito y’icyaha ishobora guhinduka igihe cyose Urukiko
rutarafata icyemezo ndakuka4.
[17] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza no RPA 0010/06/CS-RPA 0011/06/CS-RPA
0012/06/06/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 18/7/2008, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na
Sgt. NTAGANIRA Eugène na bagenzi be, kuba uregwa yagera imbere y’Urukiko agahindura
imvugo, agahakana icyaha yari yaremeye mu nzego z’iperereza, ntibivuze ko ibyo avugira mu
Rukiko agihakana ari byo bigomba kwemerwa, ahubwo Umucamanza afite ubushobozi bwo
gushishoza no gusesengura akoresheje umutimanama we, agaciro aha iryo hinduramvugo; uwo
murongo kandi wongeye gushingirwaho mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
nk’urubanza nº RPAA 00319/2022/CA rwo ku wa 17/11/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na
NSANZAMAHORO Dominique.
[18] Mu gace ka 8 k’urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru rwasobanuye ko kuba
MUKANTWARI Immaculée yarajuriye asaba kugabanyirizwa ibihano, kandi akaba ari ubwa
mbere akoze icyaha icyo ari cyo cyose no kuba urumogi yafatanwe rwarafatiriwe, ndetse no kuba
avuga ko yishoye muri icyo cyaha kubera ubukene, rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº
68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, nk’uko yahinduwe n’iya
25 (a) y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023, rwemeje ko akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano,
rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni eshanu 5.000.000 Frw, ko ariko icyo
gihano atagisubikirwa kuko kiri hejuru y’imyaka itanu (5)6.
[19] Nk’uko bigaragara MUKANTWARI Immaculée abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha yavuze ko
impamvu atemera icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi ari uko urwo yafatanywe rutari urwe, ahubwo
3 Reba urubanza no RPAA 00241/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/11/2022, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na HABANABAKIZE Sulaiman.
4 ‘’Aussi longtemps que la décision judiciaire n’est pas encore devenue irrévocable, toute qualification est susceptible
de modification. En effet, le parquet n’est pas lié par la qualification retenue par l’officier de police judiciaire ou par
la partie lésée dans sa plainte. De même la juridiction de jugement étant saisie de faits, elle peut souverainement
modifier la qualification qui lui est proposée par l’officier du ministère public ou par la partie civile en cas de citation
directe’’, Général LIKULIA BOLONGO, Droit pénal spécial zaïrois, Tome I, 2e édition, L.G.D.J., Paris, 1985, P.20.
‘’ Le juge d’appel et le (……) procèdent également de la même manière. Car ni l’un ni l’autre n’est lié par la
qualification du premier juge. Ils doivent à leur tour examiner l’exactitude de la première qualification’’, Général
LIKULIA BOLONGO, op.cit., P.21.
5 Iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, naho ihazabu ikaba ishobora kugabanywa kugeza
kuri ¼ y’ihazabu ntoya iteganywa n’itegeko”
6 Nk’uko ingingo ya 3, agace kayo ka mbere, y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange, ibiteganya.

yari arushyiriye Bukuru wari bubimuhemebere 10.000 Frw, ko uyu yaje iwe kurumuguraho
amusaba ko yarumugereza iwe mu rugo i Nyarubuye, iyo ikaba ari inshuro ya kabiri yari aje
kurumuguraho, ko ndetse ateranyije inshuro zombi baruguze yari amaze kumugurishaho ibilo
bibiri (2kg), ariko ku nshuro ya mbere akaba yararwitwariye, yavuze kandi ko urwo agurisha
ubusanzwe aruvana muri Tanzanie, kandi ko abizi ko gucuruza urumogi ari icyaha kibi.
[20] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga imiburanire ya MUKANTWARI Immaculée kuri uru
rwego rw’ubujurire bwa kabiri, irebewe hamwe n’imirongo yagaragajwe haruguru, yumvikanisha
ko kuba yarageze mu Rukiko agahindura imvugo ahakana ibikorwa yari yemeye ku rwego
rw’iperereza, ataribyo byaba impamvu yo gutuma inyito y’icyaha yahamijwe ihinduka, kuko mu
bushishozi n’umutimanama, isuzuma ry’ibyo yemeye mu Bugenzacyaha bigaragaza ko ari ukuri
kandi bifite agaciro k’ikimenyetso kidashidikanywaho gihamya ko yakoraga ubucuruzi
bw’urumogi, bityo ubujurire bwe bushingiye ku gusaba guhindura inyito y’icyaha nta shingiro
bufite.
[21] Hashingiwe ku byagaragajwe haruguru byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ubujurire
bwatanze na MUKANTWARI Immaculée nta shingiro bufite.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[22] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na MUKANTWARI Immaculée nta shingiro bufite;
[23] Rwemeje ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza n°RPA 00058/2022/HC/RWG rwaciwe
n’Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana ku wa 14/4/2025;
[24] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5000.000 Frw) yahanishijwe kigumyeho;
[25] Rutegetse ko amagarama y'urubanza aherera ku Isanduku ya Leta.
keywords: Ihame ry’amategeko nshinjabyaha ryemeza ko Inkiko ziburanisha ibikorwa bigize icyaha
